do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test: route_id differs (M101 vs SIM11) and service_variant differs (local vs express). These are distinct routes per identity merge canon.
Contradiction test: route_id differs (M101 vs SIM22) and service_variant differs (local vs express). Distinct routes.
Contradiction test: route_id differs (M101 vs SIM26) and service_variant differs (local vs express). Distinct routes.
Contradiction test: route_id differs (M101 vs SIM6) and service_variant differs (local vs express). Distinct routes.
Contradiction test: route_id differs (SIM11 vs SIM22). Different routes despite both being express.
Contradiction test: route_id differs (SIM11 vs SIM26). Different routes.
Contradiction test: route_id differs (SIM11 vs SIM6). Different routes.
Contradiction test: route_id differs (SIM22 vs SIM26). Different routes.
Contradiction test: route_id differs (SIM22 vs SIM6). Different routes.
Contradiction test: route_id differs (SIM26 vs SIM6). Different routes.

suggestion.rationale: All records have distinct route_id fields (M101 vs SIM11/22/26/6) and, where applicable, different service_variant (local vs express), satisfying the contradiction test of the identity merge canon. No record shares the same base route id plus variant; therefore no merges are possible.
